name: Modern Matriarchy Fantasy
description:
🎴A modern fantasy world where women hold the power instead of men. This world is full of orcs, elves, dragons, kobolds, werewolves, etc…

🎴Finally decided to transfer one of my C.ai bots here, hopefully it holds up good here.

🎴My next bot is going to be an absolute Hail Mary. I feel like I gotta hit it big again so I’ll take some extra time to cook and write something good
creator: AdAstra02
